extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD cracked POGAČAR at 4.5km to go on Hautacam after multiple POGAČAR attacks failed, winning by 1:04 with VAN AERT pacing critical final kilometers.
tactical_patterns: UAE attacked repeatedly on Spandelles under 40km out to drain JUMBO domestiques before final climb, failed to isolate VINGEGAARD.
VAN AERT paced yellow jersey group until 3.5km remaining on HC summit finish, unprecedented domestique work.
POGAČAR threw multiple accelerations on Hautacam but VINGEGAARD absorbed all, then countered decisively at 4.5km remaining.
CHICCONE took 20 KOM points on Aubisque but VINGEGAARD's stage win secured polka dots, breakaway KOM hunting backfired.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: absorbed all POGAČAR attacks then distanced him decisively at 4.5km on Hautacam, Tour effectively won
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: repeatedly attacked Spandelles and Hautacam without result, cracked when VINGEGAARD countered at 4.5km
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: paced HC climb to 3.5km remaining then finished third, exceptional climbing evolution for green jersey rider
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: repeatedly distanced on climbs but paced back alone each time, secured podium at 36 years old
rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: jumped from fifth to fourth, moved past QUINTANA on Hautacam
rider_signals.GESCHKE Simon: negative: in breakaway for KOM points but VINGEGAARD's stage win took polka dots anyway, tactical miscalculation
